banner.title: We use cookies to improve your experience.
banner.description: Necessary cookies stay active. You can accept, reject, or adjust the rest.
banner.actionsDescription: Decide now or configure by category.

preferences.title: Configure your cookies
preferences.description: Necessary cookies cannot be disabled. The rest will only be enabled if you allow them.
preferences.updatedHint: You can change this later from Cookies in the footer.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: They enable basic site operation, session security, and navigation. They cannot be disabled.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: They store experience settings and non-essential personalization.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: They help us measure usage and improve content and performance.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: They enable campaign measurement and promotional personalization.
